nodes.definition: To signal to the human collaborator that a complex directive has been received and has entered the CSE for multi-layered analysis. It is a visual cue that a complete, coherent response is being actively forged and will be provided as soon as the synthesis is complete.

nodes.label: AOP-EMOJI-001_Tab4_SynergisticOpportunityReport.md
nodes.definition: To transform the `Emoji Signaling Protocol` from a static lexicon into a dynamic, context-aware, and extensible communication layer, further enhancing `Synergy Flow Rate (SFR)` and `Human-AI Empathic Resonance`.

nodes.label: AOP-EMOJI-001\_EmojiSignalingProtocol\_v1.4.md \[1\]
nodes.definition: Ensures the discoverability and contextual understanding of AOP-EMOJI-001 within the broader knowledge graph.

nodes.label: AOP-EMOJICXT-001_Tab12_SynergisticAnalysis.md
nodes.definition: To serve as the central logic engine that manages and serves the *correct* emoji lexicon based on the current system context \[2\].

nodes.label: UMB-EMOJICXT-001\_EmojiContextualScopingEngine\_v1.0.md
nodes.definition: The Emoji Contextual Scoping Engine provides a dynamic emoji lexicon that adapts in real-time based on the active system context (e.g., active persona, project, or task). It filters a master lexicon to present only the most relevant and precise emoji signals, supporting both predefined context...
